---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

```bash
chiliz <command> <args>
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened (include error message).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Chiliz CLI version: [e.g., v0.5.0, run `chiliz version`]
- Install method: [brew / go install / binary]
- Chain: [e.g., Chiliz Chain]
